label: Software Engineer (AI Platform) at Replika
headline: Software Engineer (AI Platform) – LLM Orchestration, Scalable Backend Systems (C#, Python, SQL, Cloud)

storable.title: Software Engineer II
description: Developed and maintained .NET Core services with Hangfire, Entity Framework, PostgreSQL, and SQL Server to support complex auto-protect features, ensuring data synchronization and reliability.
Built APIs and background jobs to keep critical coverage, eligibility, and billing data in sync across diverse applications, contributing to system scalability and high-availability.
Clarified service boundaries and domain concepts, promoting domain-driven design adoption and improving maintainability and testability of backend systems.

iadvantage.title: Lead Developer / Azure DevOps
description: Led the delivery of GLP-compliant lab software, designing and building ASP.NET WebForms/MVC/WebAPI services with RESTful OData and SOAP endpoints, ensuring scalability and reliability of applied AI services.
Implemented configurable reporting pipelines and dynamic user-defined data models that preserved traceability and audit trails, supporting complex business logic at scale.
Guided release engineering and Azure DevOps practices for CI/CD, builds, deployments, and database migrations across environments, optimizing operational efficiency on cloud platforms.

solid-earth.title: Application Developer/Architect
description: Developed and maintained high-performance RETS client and server software on Oracle and C#, achieving top compliance and praised for speed, demonstrating expertise in scalable backend systems and API integrations.
Tuned RETS performance, protocol compliance, and data handling to ensure reliable broker and MLS integrations, addressing real-time data needs and optimizing for global growth.
Built configurable ASP.NET MLS frontends driven by XML, allowing for flexible branding and business rules without code changes, enhancing system adaptability and scalability.

rural-sourcing.title: Senior Software Developer
description: Delivered Microsoft-stack projects for multiple clients, specializing in backend, ASP.NET, and SQL Server development, acting as a hands-on contributor and a force multiplier for the team.
Mentored junior and mid-level developers on coding standards, testing habits, and practical estimation, identifying problems and proposing robust solutions.

Planned and tracked sprints, risks, and milestones, ensuring effective project management and stakeholder alignment across simultaneous backend projects, executing with velocity and a sense of ownership.

prestage-farms.title: Programmer/Analyst
description: Led a team of 6 developers and 3 QA to modernize legacy VB6 accounting and inventory systems into a cohesive .NET application with role-based security.
Analyzed legacy patterns and built transformation modules to automate conversion, preserving business logic while modernizing core systems and ensuring their scalability and reliability.
Ran Agile roadmaps and milestones, coordinating stakeholders to deliver the modernization roughly three months early, demonstrating strong ownership and execution velocity in software design.

not-rocket-science.title: Programmer/Analyst
description: Delivered full-stack .NET and SQL Server development for inventory and operations workflows, focusing on robust backend solutions and scalable data management.
Created an ActionScript + ASP.NET tracking application for shipments and tug boats with a custom web backend, demonstrating diverse backend integration skills and API usage.
Designed database schemas and service endpoints to maintain data consistency across web and mobile platforms, crucial for building scalable and reliable systems.
